title: carex capillaris
intro: Carex capillaris, also known as hair sedge or woolly sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex capillaris include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to be used for medicinal purposes.
